body: Hey Amara, just wanted to follow up on our conversation from last week about [Verdant Grid](companies/verdant-grid) — I know you mentioned Halfway was still finalizing allocation, but I wanted to flag that we're moving fairly quickly on our end. We're looking at leading the round at a $12M raise, and from what I understood, Halfway was eyeing around an 8% stake at that valuation. Wanted to make sure we're aligned before things get locked in. Let me know if your team's numbers have shifted at all — happy to jump on a quick call this week to sync. Talk soon!
